description: The UI transitions from a screen-sharing prompt to displaying the user's task instructions as the screen share is successfully established.
frame_description: The central text on the dark background changes to confirm screen sharing and then progressively reveals the task description.

description: The user remains on the page, likely reading the initial prompt and then the task instructions as they are being revealed.
frame_description: The user is stationary while the task instructions are displayed and updated on the screen.
